    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Card
    Represents a single playing card in the Cincuentazo game.
    CardValueCalculator
    Utility class that encapsulates the card-value rules for Cincuentazo.
    Deck
    Manages the draw pile (mazo) and the central table pile (mesa) for a Cincuentazo game.
    EmptyDeckException
    Unchecked (runtime) exception thrown when an attempt is made to draw a card from a completely empty deck and the mesa (table pile) does not have cards available to reshuffle.
    EmptyDeckException
    Unchecked (runtime) exception thrown when an attempt is made to draw a card from a completely empty deck and the mesa (table pile) does not have cards available to reshuffle.
    GameController
    Controlador de juego independiente de JavaFX/FXML.
    GameEventListener
    Observer interface that the View/Controller implements to react to game events.
    GameEventListener
    Observer interface that the View/Controller implements to react to game events.
    GameLogic
    Central game-logic engine for Cincuentazo.
    GameOverException
    Unchecked (runtime) exception thrown when an operation is requested on a game that has already ended.
    GameOverException
    Unchecked (runtime) exception thrown when an operation is requested on a game that has already ended.
    GameScreenController
    Controlador de GameScreen.fxml.
    GameScreenView
    Vista de la pantalla de juego.
    GameState
    Immutable snapshot of the game state at a specific point in time.
    HumanPlayer
    Represents the human player in a Cincuentazo game.
    InvalidCardPlayException
    Checked exception thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would cause the table sum to exceed 50.
    InvalidCardPlayException
    Checked exception thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would cause the table sum to exceed 50.
    MachinePlayer
    Represents an AI-controlled player in a Cincuentazo game.
    main
    Punto de entrada de la aplicación El Cincuentazo.
    MainMenuController
    Controlador de MainMenu.fxml.
    MainMenuView
    Vista del menú principal.
    Player
    Abstract base class representing a participant in a Cincuentazo game.
    PlayerHand
    Represents the set of cards currently held by one player.
    TurnManager
    Manages turn progression and concurrency for the Cincuentazo game.
